name: QMI8658 Temperature Sensor
description: The `qmi8658` sensor platform provides access to the temperature sensor in a QMI8658 Accelerometer/Gyroscope with ESPHome. It requires a [`motion`](https://esphome.io/components/motion) component to be configured with the `qmi8658` platform, which handles the accelerometer and gyroscope data processing and configures the device. See that component for more information.
